subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up — great to hear from you after the conference. We'd be glad to get a formal meeting on the calendar.

Here are a few available slots:

• April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Let us know your preference and we'll confirm with a calendar invite.

Regarding the request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — we're not able to share internal contact information externally. Rest assured, the right people will be brought into the conversation as we progress through the partnership discussion.

Looking forward to it!

Best regards
